title: Retail Advisor (Islandwide) Fast Hiring!
description:
About Us:
With 14 years in the industry, Mister Mobile is Singapore’s trusted leader in mobile services. Our vision is to empower people through technology and provide exceptional service. We offer top trade-in prices and rigorously inspected new and used devices. Our warm and friendly team fosters a culture of care and collaboration, ensuring that every customer experience is met with a personal touch. As a market leader in the mobile service provider industry, we obtained ISO certification, CaseTrust accreditation, and a Carousell InstantBuy Award. We have also received more than 15,000+ positive reviews on our services.

As a fast-growing company, we cultivate a collaborative and inclusive workplace. We prioritize employee development and uphold key values such as innovation, customer satisfaction, and teamwork while offering career growth and mentorship opportunities.

Profile:

We are looking for a motivated and customer-oriented Retail Advisor to join our team. The Retail Advisor plays a key role in ensuring smooth daily operations of the retail store while delivering exceptional customer service. This position requires strong interpersonal skills, a positive attitude, and a genuine interest in mobile and electronic devices.

Job Descriptions:

  • Responsible for day-to-day retail operations.
  • Deliver high quality and standards of service to customers.
  • Proactively engaged and attend to walk-in customers.
  • Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products and solutions.
  • Handle inquiries and resolve customer issues in a timely and professional manner
  • Provide after-sales support, including assistance with repair-related matters
  • Perform cashiering duties.
  • Receive, process, and organize incoming goods/deliveries.
  • Maintain cleanliness, organization, and product displays in the store.
  • Support the team with ad-hoc duties as and when required.

Requirements:

  • Customer service orientated and willing to go the extra mile.
  • Possesses a professional and cheerful attitude.
  • Energetic, outgoing, and friendly personality.
  • Passion for mobile and electronic devices will be highly advantageous.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, with the ability to communicate in Mandarin with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders.
  • Fresh graduates are welcome.
  • 6 days work week with 1 off day per week.

What we offer:

  • Basic Salary + Attractive Commission + Variable Bonus.
  • Medical, TCM, and Dental Benefits.
  • Attendance, Housekeeping, and Accessories Allowance.
  • Overtime Transport Claims.
  • Fun and Dynamic Work Environment.
  • Opportunities for Promotion and Career Advancement.
  • Comprehensive On-the-Job Training Provided.

If you have a cheerful attitude, strong communication skills, and a passion for mobile devices, we would love to hear from you! Kindly submit your resume to joeann@mistermobile.com.sg and/or WhatsApp: +60 11-1093 8803

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Thank you for applying with us!

postedCompany.description:
Mister Mobile was established on 2010 Singapore at the hidden treasure trove of City Plaza. Mister Mobile has slowly built on its humble beginnings amidst the fuss and buzz around the area to come to where we are today.


Between 2010 to 2019, no one could find us as we did not have an online presence. No review of Mister Mobile, no ratings. Yet we survived due to our loyal customers who brought new customers to us through word-of-mouth. we are growing steadily in every aspect, including an expansion of our services, inventory as well as manpower.


In 2017, Mister Mobile decided that expanding our online presence is the most effective way to bring our brand of product and service quality to more people in Singapore. At affordable prices compared to our competitors, we promise to provide satisfaction without compromising on quality.


In 2022, Mister Mobile has 5 branches at City Plaza(Geylang) Hougang, Chinatown, Jurong, & Woodlands.


In 2023, Mister Mobile totally knocked it out of the park! Their enthusiasm was off the charts, and guess what? They went above and beyond, not just opening their 6th outlet in Potong Pasir but also rocking it with a 7th outlet in Yishun! 


In 2024, Mister Mobile is keeping the dream alive! They're on fire once more, by launching their 8th and 9th outlets at Bukit Panjang Plaza and Tampines One! Come join our passionate team, and together, let's keep making history! 🚀
postedCompany.name: MISTER MOBILE WOODLANDS PTE. LTD.
